title: Cavril: Wayfarer
description: Guided hexcrawl travel for Foundry. Reads the hex under the party token (Augur: Hexlands tile flags, with filename fallbacks) for its biome, travel DC and movement restriction; plan a course over reachable hexes at a chosen pace and auto-move the party. Run a guided group check — claim Navigator/Scout/Forager from the party group actor, swap skills per situation, roll in Foundry or auto-fill from D&D Beyond (via ddb-roll-cards), resolve vs the route's governing DC drawing editable RollTables. Party supplies are summed from member sheets + the group's shared stash and consumed on camp; weather and the clock come from Mini Calendar. Softly integrates with Augur: Nexus sites.
